scenarios.name: multi-platform-campaign-structure
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers the required campaign structure, CBO, exclusions, UTM links, and a creative brief, but fails to provide at least three ads per ad set and leaves retention ad sets incomplete; Response B lacks ad‑set detail, CBO, exclusions, UTM links, and a full creative brief.

scenarios.name: declining-roas-bid-optimization
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers all rubric items with detailed actions, while Response B lacks explicit weekly targets and frequency control.

scenarios.name: cross-platform-attribution-framework
scenarios.rationale: Response A provides a more comprehensive UTM scheme, holdout plan, and weekly template, but both lack an attribution model and explicit double‑counting adjustment; A covers more rubric items overall.
